title: Quiz: Bernstein-Vazirani Algorithm
description: Test your understanding of the BV algorithm

questions.question: How many queries does the BV algorithm need to find an n-bit hidden string?
questions.explanation: BV needs exactly 1 quantum query, vs n classical queries.

questions.question: The function in BV is f(x) = ?
questions.explanation: f(x) = s·x mod 2, the bitwise inner product modulo 2.

questions.question: The BV algorithm uses the same circuit structure as Deutsch-Jozsa.
questions.explanation: Both use H^⊗n, oracle query, then H^⊗n on input register.

questions.question: After measurement, the BV algorithm returns:
questions.explanation: The measurement directly reveals s with probability 1.
